providers.name: Mehran Manoel
providers.bio: Dr. Mehran Manoel is a board-certified orthopedic surgeon specializing in sports medicine, joint care, and minimally invasive orthopedic procedures.

providers.name: Amir Salem
providers.bio: Dr. Amir Salem is an expert in interventional radiology and vascular surgery, specializing in image-guided minimally invasive procedures including GAE and embolization.
